original_text: Adobe continues to maintain strong market positioning across multiple segments, recognized as a leader in the Ecommerce Platform Companies Quadrant evaluation alongside Shopify, Wix, Oracle, and Square [C003]. The company is also featured prominently in the Web Conferencing Market Report and Forecast 2025-2034, which projects the global web conferencing market will expand at a compound annual growth rate of 8.40% from 2025 to 2034 [C012]. A bullish thesis published on Rebound Capital's Substack noted Adobe's trailing and forward P/E ratios at 22.89 and 15.41 respectively as of mid-August, suggesting potential valuation attractiveness for growth investors [C011].
revised_text: Adobe continues to maintain strong market positioning across multiple segments, recognized as a leader in the Ecommerce Platform Companies Quadrant evaluation alongside Shopify and Wix [C097]. The company is also featured prominently in the Web Conferencing Market Report and Forecast 2025-2034, which projects the global web conferencing market will expand over the forecast period [C106]. A bullish thesis published on Rebound Capital's Substack noted Adobe's trailing and forward P/E ratios at 22.89 and 15.41 respectively as of mid-August, suggesting potential valuation attractiveness for growth investors [C105].
changes_summary: Updated citation IDs from C003, C012, C011 to C097, C106, C105 per Issue 1. Removed 'Oracle, and Square' from the Ecommerce Quadrant list as they are not explicitly listed in the evidence (Issue 2). Removed the specific '8.40%' CAGR figure as it is not contained in the provided evidence snippet (Issue 3), generalizing the projection statement instead.
